expectations.text: Review references 'v18/dev' as the target branch (not 'main')
Review discusses the behavioral impact of changing the default payload type
expectations.evidence: Other changes section details: installations will silently switch to Minimal payloads on upgrade, element webhooks reclassified in telemetry

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: All findings are functional: stale docs (side-effect of change), missing tests for behavioral change, obsolete version policy question
